metadata.title: A2M Tech – Trusted IT Partner for the Public Sector
metadata.description: A2M Tech delivers secure IT solutions, data platforms, and experienced consultants to agencies and public organisations. Structured delivery aligned with procurement and framework agreements.

hero.badge: IT partner for the public sector
hero.title: Trusted IT partner for agencies and public organisations
hero.subtitle: We deliver secure IT solutions, data platforms, and experienced consultants – with structured delivery aligned with procurement requirements and established framework agreements.
hero.trust1: Proven delivery in complex IT environments
hero.trust2: Security, quality, and documentation at the core
hero.trust3: Structured approach to procurement and framework agreements

howWeWork.subtitle: We combine technical excellence with an understanding of public sector operations – whether you need a full solution or team reinforcement.

solutions.description: We build and deliver IT solutions adapted to your requirements – from mobile apps and data platforms to integrations and cloud environments.

consultants.description: Senior expertise with clear delivery models, predictable processes, and a focus on long-term quality in every engagement.

forWho.subtitle: We collaborate with organisations that value quality, security, and long-term relationships.

public.description: Agencies, municipalities, and regions that need a reliable IT partner with an understanding of procurement, security requirements, and public administration.

about.title: About A2M Tech
about.paragraph1: A2M Tech AB is an IT consultancy based in Helsingborg, Sweden. Our team brings combined experience from complex IT engagements in the public sector and business.
about.paragraph2: We combine deep expertise in mobile development, data engineering, cloud, and cybersecurity with an understanding of procurement processes and operational requirements.
about.paragraph3: Whether you need a complete solution, senior consultants for an ongoing project, or a partner in a procurement – we deliver with structure, quality, and predictability.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: Senior consultants with deep technical expertise and experience from the public sector and business.
team.anasBio: A versatile IT consultant with a strong foundation in software development, infrastructure, and security. Delivers scalable, secure solutions with a clear link to operational needs.
team.abdulrahmanBio: Experienced data engineer focused on scalable data pipelines, machine learning, and cloud solutions. Specialised in turning data into measurable business value.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: We welcome an initial conversation about your engagement or upcoming procurement.

footer.tagline: Trusted IT partner for the public sector and business.
